talk_metadata.talk_title: Leveraging Novel Technologies to Delineate Therapeutic Resistance
rhetorical_signals: Speaker said: even if you hit and inhibit the mutation, sometimes that doesn't always translate to tumor responses
Speaker said: we didn't see any benefit at all in the adjuvant studies with canakinumab despite compelling incidence reduction

vulnerability_identified.mechanistic_blindspot: overlapping resistance mechanisms such as lineage plasticity that are not overcome by on‑target inhibition alone
lack of real‑time molecular re‑biopsy to identify cMET amplification leading to heterogeneous enrollment

trial_dilution_risk.trial_name_or_nct: cMET combination Phase III trials (Novartis and Merck)
trial_dilution_risk.target_biology: cMET amplification as a second driver in EGFR‑mutant NSCLC
trial_dilution_risk.flawed_enrollment_criteria: Enrolling patients without prospective ctDNA or tissue confirmation of cMET amplification, leading to heterogeneous population
trial_dilution_risk.missing_biomarker: Standardized cutoff for cMET copy number (e.g., 5 vs 10) and real‑time confirmation
trial_dilution_risk.static_vs_dynamic_failure: No on‑treatment ctDNA or serial biopsy to track emergence of cMET amplification
trial_dilution_risk.statistical_concern: Underpowered to detect benefit in a low‑prevalence biomarker subgroup

key_data_gaps: Lack of randomized comparator arms for many biomarker‑selected cohorts

crispro_opportunity.description: Need for robust primary resistance biomarkers (e.g., lncRNA‑EGFR isoform D, lineage‑plastic signatures) to enrich trials.
crispro_opportunity.transcript_evidence: Speaker noted primary resistance remains poorly understood and that 50‑60% of frontline third‑gen EGFR patients lack any known resistance mechanism on NGS.
crispro_opportunity.crispro_angle: CrisPRO can integrate multi‑omics (RNA‑seq, spatial transcriptomics, proteomics) to generate predictive signatures for primary resistance.
external_validation_needed: PubMed: studies on lncRNA‑EGFR isoform D
ClinicalTrials.gov: trials enrolling EGFR‑mutant NSCLC with biomarker‑driven arms

crispro_opportunity.description: Target lineage‑plastic and stromal‑rich tumor microenvironment (myeloid‑skewed) using FAP‑directed or radioligand therapies.
crispro_opportunity.transcript_evidence: Speaker described a stromal‑rich TME associated with poor‑risk relapse and suggested FAP‑targeting drugs as potential combos.
crispro_opportunity.crispro_angle: CrisPRO can model tumor‑stroma interaction networks to prioritize combination partners that reverse myeloid‑skewed states.
external_validation_needed: SEC filings: pipeline status of radioligand therapies

crispro_opportunity.description: Incorporate on‑treatment biopsies and ctDNA monitoring to dynamically adapt therapy, reducing dilution of signal in broad Phase III studies.
crispro_opportunity.transcript_evidence: Speaker advocated single‑agent third‑gen TKI with on‑treatment biopsy to allocate combination agents, noting current trials lack such adaptive design.
crispro_opportunity.crispro_angle: CrisPRO can provide real‑time decision algorithms linking ctDNA kinetics to recommended combination switches.
external_validation_needed: ClinicalTrials.gov: trials using adaptive biomarker‑driven arms in EGFR‑mutant NSCLC

cited_competitors.name: Novartis
cited_competitors.context: Conducted cMET combination Phase III trials that were terminated early due to heterogeneity.

cited_competitors.name: Merck
cited_competitors.context: Also ran cMET combination Phase III trials terminated early.

cited_competitors.name: Roche
cited_competitors.context: Mentioned in context of RET inhibitor development and Phase III trials.

unresolved_questions: What molecular assays can reliably identify primary resistance mechanisms before frontline therapy?
How can trials efficiently incorporate real‑time ctDNA or on‑treatment biopsies without prohibitive cost?
What surrogate endpoints (e.g., ctDNA clearance) are acceptable to regulators for accelerated approval?

assets_to_track: cMET inhibitors in combination with EGFR TKIs
